response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP protocols, aligning with key responsibilities, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years specifically in production-grade AI solutions, cloud-based GenAI systems, or vector/RAG architectures, and his resume emphasizes legacy systems and non-AI projects more prominently than required GenAI expertise.
strengths: Extensive experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Direct exposure to Model Context Protocol (MCP) and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Proven leadership in mentoring, workshops, and open-source contributions across decades of engineering
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization techniques in work history
AI experience is described broadly; lacks depth in production-grade GenAI system delivery over 8+ years
Education shows only a BS; no advanced degree or formal AI/ML specialization indicated
